resources.citation: DeMuth et al., TC PRIMED v01r01 products and documentation
resources.label_unit: satellite overpass with calibrated observations and metadata
resources.assessment: Provides storm-centered observations and metadata; the documented product variables contain no published ERC event-label column.

resources.citation: DeMuth et al., TC PRIMED v01r01 data documentation
resources.label_unit: documented satellite and storm metadata variables
resources.assessment: The variable inventory documents calibrated observations, storm metadata, and ancillary fields without an ERC truth-label variable.
Provides observed wind fields and structure variables; ERC sequence labels remain an analysis product.

resources.citation: Kuo et al. 2009, Monthly Weather Review, DOI 10.1175/2009MWR2850.1
resources.assessment: A deterministic 62-row published CE-formation table with storm identifier, image time, inner-eyewall radius, and moat width. CE formation and completed ERC remain separate event semantics.

resources.citation: Kossin et al. 2023, Weather and Forecasting, DOI 10.1175/WAF-D-22-0178.1
resources.years: training and independent periods defined in paper
resources.assessment: Publishes the algorithm, event definition, sample sizes, and verification; a downloadable row-level western North Pacific label table is absent from the paper package.
The public development archive is Atlantic-focused and does not supply a western North Pacific row-level ERC truth table.

resources.citation: CIMSS ARCHER M-PERC 2017 all-basin product archive
resources.region: multiple basins, including western North Pacific product pages
resources.assessment: Contains western North Pacific model-output pages; those probabilities are predictions and do not constitute independent event truth labels.

resources.citation: Zhu and Yu 2019, Journal of the Meteorological Society of Japan, DOI 10.2151/jmsj.2019-008
resources.label_unit: manually classified T-ERC and N-ERC cases
resources.assessment: Reports aggregate manually classified T-ERC and N-ERC samples; the article package contains no complete machine-readable row table.
The downloadable supplement is an abstract file and carries no row-level case table.
